last_safe_checkpoint.description: Validated the inotify daemonize fix with settle-window retry, prompt preservation, PLAN gating, and stale-result replacement.

bootstrap.goal: Restore daemonize to inotify-based watching, preserve prompt files on Ctrl+C, gate completion on PLAN.md, and reprocess prompts when a stale completed result file already exists.

task_sync.resume_checkpoint: Resume from commit preparation and push for the validated `inotify` daemonize fix; otherwise the next daemon scope can begin from this requeue-safe baseline.

items.text: Phase 1. Refresh `.dev` state for the restored `inotify`-based `daemonize` scope and replace the stale polling-only narrative
Phase 2. Restore `inotify` watcher selection with event-level logging and keep polling as the explicit fallback path
Phase 3. Preserve user prompt files on `Ctrl+C`, gate daemon prompt completion on the session `PLAN.md` reaching all `[O]`, and retry after the settle window without waiting for another watcher event
Phase 4. Reprocess requeued prompt filenames by removing stale completed result files before execution starts
Phase 5. Add regression coverage and run automated plus real daemon smoke validation for the restored `inotify` workflow

next_action: Prepare a commit and push for the validated inotify daemonize slice.
notes: Resume from the active daemonize polling slice unless a new higher-priority request overrides it.
Legacy TASKS.md snapshots should be migrated forward into PLAN.md without losing checklist state.
Daemonize again prefers inotify on Linux for auto watch mode and logs each watcher event as it arrives.
Daemon prompt completion now depends on the synced session PLAN summary reporting all tasks complete.
A fresh prompt with the same filename now removes any stale completed result file and is reprocessed immediately.
Focused validation passed through python3 -m unittest tests.test_daemon tests.test_tasks tests.test_supervisor.
